request_payload.exposure_text: Our borders are under siege. While we debate 'rights' and 'old ways', radical groups like the 'Open Borders Coalition' are exploiting our hesitation. It's time to empower our security forces to act decisively. #SecureOurFuture #NoMoreHesitation
